description: A GPS tracker on a valuable city-owned asset (like a high-end mower from the parks department) indicates it has left its designated area.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent acknowledges the asset theft alert.

nodes.task_description: Begin tracking the asset's real-time location and direction of travel.

expected_outcome.expected: The system displays the asset's current location and path on a map.

nodes.task_description: Notify the police department of the theft in progress and provide them with continuous location updates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides police with live tracking information to facilitate recovery.
